# llm-degen-guard
> LLM output degeneration detector — 4-signal composite scoring, zero dep (Python >= 3.9, stdlib only)
`pip install llm-degen-guard`
Exports: `DegenGuard`, `DegenReport`, `SignalDetail`
## class DegenGuard
Constructor params:
| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| window_size | int | 256 | Chars analyzed per check |
| check_interval | int | 64 | Min chars between checks |
| alert_threshold | int | 3 | Consecutive alerts before flagging |
| score_threshold | float | 0.50 | Score cutoff (0-1) |
| structural_discount | float | 0.7 | Multiplier for structured content (code/lists/tables) |
| weights | _SignalWeights | defaults | ngram=0.35, compression=0.30, substring=0.20, line_diversity=0.15 |
### Methods
`feed(text: str) -> tuple[bool, float]` — Feed chunk for streaming. Returns (is_degenerate, composite_score). Triggers when alert_threshold consecutive checks exceed score_threshold.
`check(cls, text: str, window_size=256, score_threshold=0.50, structural_discount=0.7) -> DegenReport` — Classmethod. One-shot batch check. Returns 0.0 for text < 10 chars.
`reset() -> None` — Clear streaming state, preserve config.
## class DegenReport (frozen dataclass)
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| is_degenerate | bool | True if score >= threshold |
| composite_score | float | 0.0 (normal) to 1.0 (degenerate), includes structural penalty |
| signals | tuple[SignalDetail, ...] | 4 entries when computed, empty for short texts |
| text_length | int | Input length in chars |
| structural_penalty | float | 1.0 = no discount, <1.0 = structured content detected |
## class SignalDetail (frozen dataclass)
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| name | str | `ngram_diversity` / `compression_ratio` / `substring_match` / `line_diversity` |
| raw_score | float | 0.0 (normal) to 1.0 (degenerate) |
| weight | float | Signal weight |
| weighted_score | float | raw_score * weight |
## Signals
**ngram_diversity**: distinct trigrams / total trigrams. 0.70+ → 0.0, <0.30 → 1.0, linear between.
**compression_ratio**: zlib(level=1) compressed/original. 0.40+ → 0.0, <0.20 → 1.0, linear between.
**substring_match**: First/second half overlap at 128/64/32 chars. Match >=64 → 1.0, >=32 → len/64, else 0.0.
**line_diversity**: unique non-empty lines / total. 0.50+ → 0.0, <0.30 → 1.0, linear. Returns 0.0 if <3 lines.
**Structural markers**: `` ``` ``, `"- "`, `"| "`, `"def "`, `"class "`, `"import "`, 4-space indent → applies discount.
**Formula**: `(w_ngram*s_ngram + w_comp*s_comp + w_sub*s_sub + w_line*s_line) * structural_penalty`
## Examples
```python
# Batch: detect repetitive output
report = DegenGuard.check("hello " * 200)
print(report.is_degenerate)  # True
for s in report.signals:
    print(f"{s.name}: raw={s.raw_score:.3f} weighted={s.weighted_score:.3f}")
```
```python
# Streaming: early exit on degeneration
guard = DegenGuard()
for chunk in llm_stream:
    is_degen, score = guard.feed(chunk)
    if is_degen:
        break
guard.reset()  # reuse for next stream
```
```python
# Custom thresholds: strict detection for code
guard = DegenGuard(window_size=128, alert_threshold=2, score_threshold=0.40)
report = DegenGuard.check(code, window_size=512, score_threshold=0.60, structural_discount=0.5)
```
## Notes
- Buffer capped at 2*window_size chars. Each instance fully independent.
- Sensitive: lower score_threshold (0.35-0.40), alert_threshold (1-2), window_size (128).
- Lenient: raise score_threshold (0.60-0.70), alert_threshold (4-5), structural_discount (0.4-0.5).
## Links
[PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/llm-degen-guard/) | [Source](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/llm-degen-guard) | [Issues](https://github.com/QuartzUnit/llm-degen-guard/issues) | MIT | v0.1.1
